name: v0.2.0 — Bug Fix Release
body:
## What's Changed

This release fixes all open bug issues and significantly improves the engine's correctness and safety.

### Bug Fixes

- **#2 Duplicate Order ID Detection**: Engine now maintains an order index (`map[string]string`) and rejects orders with duplicate IDs. Order IDs are freed after the order is fully filled or cancelled, allowing reuse.

- **#3 Thread-Safe Order Book Reads**: `GetOrderBook()` now returns a deep-copy snapshot instead of an internal pointer. Callers can safely read and iterate over the snapshot from any goroutine without data races.

- **#5 Bounded Trade Log**: The in-memory trade log is now capped at a configurable size (default: 10,000). When the limit is reached, the oldest 10% of entries are evicted. A new `WithTradeHandler(fn)` option allows real-time trade processing via callback. The log can be disabled entirely with `WithMaxTradeLog(0)`.

- **#10 Symbol Validation**: Symbols are now normalized (uppercased, whitespace-trimmed). Empty and whitespace-only symbols are rejected. Optional `RegisterSymbol()` enables strict mode where only pre-registered symbols are accepted.

### New Features

- `engine.New()` now accepts functional options: `WithMaxTradeLog(n)` and `WithTradeHandler(fn)`
- `engine.RegisterSymbol(symbol)` for strict symbol validation
- `orderbook.Snapshot()` for deep-copy order book reads
- `orderbook.HasOrder(id)` for O(1) order existence check

### Tests

11 new test cases added covering all bug fixes:
- Duplicate ID rejection and reuse after fill/cancel
- Snapshot isolation and concurrent access (100 goroutines)
- Bounded trade log, disabled log, and trade handler callback
- Empty symbol rejection, case normalization, and registered-only mode

### Breaking Changes

- `GetOrderBook()` now returns a snapshot (deep copy). Code that relied on mutating the returned book to affect engine state will need to be updated.
- Duplicate order IDs are now rejected with an error.
- Empty/whitespace symbols are now rejected with an error.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/iwtxokhtd83/MatchEngine/compare/v0.1.0...v0.2.0
